title: Trump Unseal 80 Years Of UAP Files
Trump Administration Launches Pentagon Website For Newly Released UFO Files
Pentagon releases never-before-seen UFO files
description: The Pentagon released what it calls never-before-seen files on UFOs.

title: US Releases Trove of UFO Files Including Apollo Moon Sightings
description: The US government released 161 UAP files on Wednesday, including Apollo astronauts' reports of unidentified objects on the moon and declassified military sighting records spanning decades.

title: Pentagon Declassifies More UFO Sightings Though No Sight Of Little Green Space Dudes
description: Lifelong sky watchers seem a little let down after getting everything they asked for in newly uncovered, underwhelming evidence
